wins: Strong retail deposit share retention with fifth consecutive year leading the industry
Record AUM and client assets growth due to net inflows and higher market levels
Robust investment banking fees up 16% year-on-year with strong equity underwriting
Positive credit performance in both wholesale and consumer segments
Confidence in long-term trajectory of retail deposit growth despite macroeconomic shifts
risks: Elevated wholesale charge-offs due to fraud incidents
Potential for higher credit losses in a downturn due to normalized charge-off rates
Uncertainty around labor market and potential credit cycle deterioration
Higher expenses due to labor inflation and revenue-related costs
Challenges in AI-driven productivity gains impacting expense growth
